title: Arugula, Fennel and Citrus Salad
notes: Prep time: 25 minutes. Total time: 25 minutes. Difficulty: easy. To supreme grapefruit and orange: trim the ends, set one end flat on a cutting board, slice off the peel in sections, then hold the fruit over a bowl and cut along the membranes to release segments. Squeeze the membranes for juice.
